name: The Weakest Tamer Began a Journey to Pick Up Trash
original_name: 最弱テイマーはゴミ拾いの旅を始めました。
overview: Stars are everything, granting abilities to Tamers. So when Ivy was born without one, her village took it as an ill omen! Now banished, she leads a lonely life of salvaging rubbish to survive. That is until she befriends Sora, a weak little slime, in the forest. Together, the delicate duo embarks on a heartwarming journey of survival and discovers there’s more to Ivy than being starless.
